title: MChangeHighlighter
description: Now we actually SEE the CoreProtect!
body:
# MChangeHighlighter ## Now its much easier to do the [CoreProtect](https://modrinth.com/plugin/coreprotect) investigation!
Client-Side Fabric mod which helps to perform Server Moderatoration by visualizing with outlines the blocks provided by the plugin! Requires - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - *[CoreProtect](https://modrinth.com/plugin/coreprotect) (- on the server!) ** ** ### Demo: ![demo1](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/397b4d51-c86b-4eda-abf9-94736f88adaf) ![demo3](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0087b610-e081-4a28-b4cb-54e7d2e2f1c3) ### Visualization management Auto enabled at the start. Toggleable render & clean data hotkey: ![democlear](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2169ec88-6a25-4ab3-9fd3-3d55bd30af21) 2 render-modes: ![demothrough](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/68279d04-9978-4bcc-a6d9-7f6f41d265df) Customizable highlighting for actions and blocks (config file): ![demo2](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/620f21c0-74f4-44b4-8c2c-b534be76fb62) *You can also setup the mod behaviour in the mod config file*
